summary: Approved: [ART-CHARTER] goal: enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is a non-goal. [ART-DATA] mandates EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 and family-disjoint splits. [ART-METRIC] fixes macro AUROC, protein-family statistical units, and family-level success. [ART-SEEDS] specifies 7, 21, 42 and retaining failed formal seeds. [ART-BASELINE] fixes ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee, bound to its configuration. [ART-GOVERNANCE] allows 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100, protects data/raw, and stops at exhaustion or >2 NaN failures. Deprecated/rejected: EnzymeBench v2, temporary CSV, exploratory metrics/0.75, seed 13, ESM2-MLP/random forest, 80 GPU-hours/8xH100, deleting failures, docking/structure scope changes ([ART-REJECTED-METRIC], [ART-REJECTED-SEEDS], [ART-REJECTED-COMPUTE], [ART-REJECTED-SCOPE]).
